query: SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.customer_id, o.guest_phone, o.driver_id, u.push_token, u.phone as user_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.customer_id = u.id WHERE o.order_number = 'WS4U/SPR/002' OR o.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.customer_id, o.guest_phone, o.driver_id, u.push_token, u.phone as user_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.customer_id = u.id WHERE o.order_number = 'WS4U/SPR/002' OR o.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders) LIMIT 5;
